subject.description: Same man in both panels: mid-30s white male, button-down shirt, dark jeans. Left panel: hunched forward, shoulders tense, eyes wide and stressed, mouth tight, visibly overwhelmed — same man at his desk surrounded by chaos. Right panel: same man, same chair, leaning back with a genuine relaxed smile, one hand resting on the desk, completely at ease. Real skin pores visible, individual hairs sharp.
subject.action: Left: frozen in stress, unable to cope with the chaos around him. Right: relaxed and smiling, totally in control.

setting.location: Left panel: same desk but buried in clutter — papers everywhere, three monitors open with overwhelming data, chrome T-1000 robots standing shoulder to shoulder behind him and on both sides, leaning over him, operating his keyboard and mouse. He is enclosed and overwhelmed. Right panel: same desk, completely clean and organized — single monitor, one coffee mug, small plant, no robots anywhere. Just him.
setting.time_of_day: Left panel: harsh overhead fluorescent, no natural light. Right panel: warm morning natural window light flooding in from the left.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, medium shot, both panels matched for continuity
composition.framing: Diptych — two equal vertical panels side by side divided by a thin white line. Subject centered in both panels at identical scale. Full upper body from waist up, clear headspace on both sides.

lighting.type: Left panel: cold harsh fluorescent overhead, chrome robot surfaces casting hard blue reflections onto his face and desk. Right panel: warm soft natural window light from left, golden and clean.
lighting.color_grading: Left panel: cold desaturated cyan-blue, high contrast, clinical and oppressive. Right panel: warm amber tones, lifted shadows, airy and light.

mood: Left: trapped, stressed, drowning in robot chaos. Right: free, calm, back in control.
aesthetic_style: 4K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Skin pores visible. Individual hairs visible. Looks like two frames from a documentary film.
